summary: Completed comprehensive mobile dashboard AI-first experience testing across multiple viewports. Mobile layout with AI Hero, 4 quick actions, and content stack working perfectly. Desktop 3-column grid properly hidden/shown as expected.

ui_bugs.issue: AI orb click fails due to CSS animation instability
ui_bugs.details: CSS keyframe 'mobile-orb-pulse' animation prevents stable element interaction. Element remains functional but click events timeout due to animation.

passed_tests: Blue AI orb visibility and styling
4 quick action buttons (finances, week, risks, performance)
Mobile content stack with Attention/Projects/Financial panels
Desktop columns hidden on mobile viewport
Mobile TopBar layout (burger left, brand center, notification+avatar right)
Desktop TopBar layout (burger hidden, settings visible)
Desktop content counts (3 attention, 3 projects, 4 trades, 4 schedule, 4 tasks)
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider reducing or disabling the mobile-orb-pulse animation intensity to improve click stability while maintaining visual appeal
